title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 56.020 - When term begins
text:
56.020.  When term begins. — Prosecuting attorneys elected under the provisions of this chapter shall enter upon the discharge of their duties on the first day of January next after they shall have been elected.
(RSMo 1939 § 12935) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11310; 1919 § 730; 1909 § 1001
